title: Castle Playset with Light and Sound Princess Figures Playset Doll House Childrens Doll House Castle with Figures and Accessories Pretend Play Castle Toy with Furnitures
features: Perfect for your own Little Princess! This playset has lots of accessories like 2 princess figures, a bed, a mirror, a dressing table, a closet, a sofa, a table and chairs, a toilet and bathroom, a pretend kitchen, and a cupboard. Decorate your own castle.
Castle play-set with lights & sound - See your castle light up and emit sounds as you press the button! Requires 2 AA Batteries. Light and sound Princess Castle with 13 Pcs Accessories
Great for Kids 3 and up - castle playset - Great gift for birthdays, holidays, and other times of celebration.
Adorably styled and made from non-toxic materials.
High Quality Princess Playset. Box Size: 37cm x 31cm x 7cm
description: Product Description Dream Beauty Castle Playset This enchanting set features a stunning castle dollhouse, complete with a variety of accessories for hours of creative play. The playset includes a mini manicure table, mini chair, and mini accessories fit for any doll, alongside a host of other delightful features. Princess Musical Castle This castle with lights and sound adds to the immersive experience, this set is a dream come true for any little princess. Crafted from superior-quality plastic, it ensures durability and long-lasting fun. It's not just a playset; it's a gateway to a world where every girl can feel like royalty. kids castle playset Durable Construction: Made from high-quality plastic, ensuring durability and safe play for years to come. Inspires Creative Play: Encourages imaginative storytelling and role-playing, perfect for developing creativity and social skills. Castle Set Toy Enchanting Castle Design : A beautifully crafted princess dream castle with intricate details and vibrant colours. Interactive Lights and Sounds: Enhance playtime with engaging lights and music, creating a magical atmosphere. Disney Princess toy castle Safety First: Designed with safety in mind, not recommended for children under 3 years old. Perfect Gift Idea: An ideal gift for young girls, offering endless hours of enchanting play. Expansive Playset: The set includes a total of 13 accessories, providing a variety of play options and setups.
